hero.title: Your Website, Handled. Finally.
hero.subtitle: AI builds your professional website in 15 minutes. Just search for your business.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to a stunning website
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find your business or start fresh. Our AI pulls in your details automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our engine generates a gorgeous, SEO-optimized website tailored to your brand.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your site is hosted, secured with SSL, and deployed to 300+ edge locations worldwide.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Built-in tools so you can focus on your business
features.aiDesc: Professional websites built by AI in minutes, not weeks.
features.domainDesc: Connect your own domain or use a free subdomain.
features.seoDesc: Rank higher with schema markup, meta tags, and fast load times.
features.analyticsDesc: Track visitors, conversions, and performance in real time.
features.paymentsDesc: Accept payments with built-in Stripe integration.
features.hostingDesc: Deployed on Cloudflare's edge network for blazing speed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We have answers.
faq.q1: How long does it take to build my website?
faq.a1: Our AI generates your website in under 15 minutes. You can preview it, make edits, and go live the same day.
faq.q2: Can I use my own domain name?
faq.a2: Yes. You can connect any domain you own, or use a free subdomain on projectsites.dev.
faq.q3: What if I need changes after launch?
faq.a3: You get unlimited edits. Use our visual editor or ask AI to make changes for you.
faq.a4: Yes. You can build and preview your site for free. You only pay when you are ready to go live.
faq.a5: Your site stays live through the end of your billing period. You can export your content at any time.
faq.a6: We integrate with Stripe for payments. Full e-commerce features including product pages and checkout are coming soon.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Build your professional website in minutes, not months.

footer.copyright: Built with AI by Megabyte Labs
